tasks.label: GIT: Add Commit Push
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && git add . && git commit -m "${input:commitMessage}" && git push && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: DEPLOY: FE Cloudflare
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run deploy:cf && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: DEV: FE Web
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run dev; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 0 ]; then echo "RESULT: SUCCESS"; else echo "RESULT: FAIL"; fi; exit "$code"

tasks.label: DEPLOY: BE Worker
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run deploy && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: DEV: BE Worker
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run dev; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 0 ]; then echo "RESULT: SUCCESS"; else echo "RESULT: FAIL"; fi; exit "$code"

tasks.label: LOGS: BE Worker Tail
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && wrangler tail; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 0 ]; then echo "RESULT: SUCCESS"; else echo "RESULT: FAIL"; fi; exit "$code"

tasks.label: CHECK: FE Build
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run build && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: CHECK: FE Lint
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run lint && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: CHECK: BE Test
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm test -- --run && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: CHECK: BE Auth API Smoke
tasks.command: verify_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/lensically_verify_body.$$ -w "%{http_code}" "https://api.lensically.com/api/auth/verify-email?token=not-a-uuid") && reset_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/lensically_reset_body.$$ -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.lensically.com/api/auth/reset-password" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"token":"bad-token","password":"new-password-123"}') && [ "$verify_code" = "400" ] && [ "$reset_code" = "400" ] && grep -q "Invalid or expired verification token." /tmp/lensically_verify_body.$$ && grep -q "Invalid or expired reset token." /tmp/lensically_reset_body.$$ && rm -f /tmp/lensically_verify_body.$$ /tmp/lensically_reset_body.$$ && echo "RESULT: SUCCESS" || echo "RESULT: FAIL"

tasks.label: PROMPT: Step 1 Port AI Chat Context
